scripts.build: tsc && npx tailwindcss -i ./public/global.css -o ./public/output.css --minify && tsc --project tsconfig.scripts.json && npx esbuild dist/main.js --bundle --outfile=public/renderer.js --platform=browser --format=iife && npx esbuild dist/layout.js --bundle --outfile=public/layout.bundle.js --platform=browser --format=iife
scripts.build:sidecar: npm run prepare:frida-binding && npm run prepare:agent-resource && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('dist/scripts',{recursive:true});require('fs').copyFileSync('public/scripts/agent.js','dist/scripts/agent.js');require('fs').copyFileSync('public/scripts/mute-logging.js','dist/scripts/mute-logging.js')" && npx pkg dist/bridge.js -t node18-win-x64 -o src-tauri/binaries/bridge-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.exe
scripts.dist: node -e "require('dotenv').config();const{execSync:r}=require('child_process');r('npm run build && npm run build:sidecar && npx tauri build',{stdio:'inherit',env:{...process.env}})"
scripts.release: node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version;const{execSync:r}=require('child_process');r('npm run dist && git add -A && git commit -m \"chore: bump version to v'+v+'\" && git tag v'+v+' && git push origin main --tags && gh release create v'+v+' src-tauri/target/release/bundle/nsis/*.exe --title \"v'+v+'\" --generate-notes',{stdio:'inherit'})"
scripts.clean:win: rd /s /q dist && rd /s /q build && del public/output.css /q
